app_id.description: Unique identifier for the App Engine application, used for resource management

code_bucket.description: Cloud Storage bucket for storing application code and artifacts

default_bucket.description: Default Cloud Storage bucket linked to the App Engine application

default_hostname.description: Primary hostname used to access the App Engine application

gcr_domain.description: Domain name for accessing Google Container Registry resources

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the App Engine application in configurations

name.description: Name of the App Engine application, useful for identification and logging

url_dispatch_rule.description: Set of URL dispatch rules for routing requests to specific services
